chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.339 of 2023 Muhammad Amir Ali Versus Mst. Farah Akhter & others Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to non-prosecution of appeal as office objections No.1, 2, 5 10A, 15, 18, 20, 22, 23 and 24, not comply with as yet. Dated: 03.11.2023 None present. -.-.- The matter is coming up for non-prosecution and on the last date i.e. 12.10.203 when no one was present on behalf of the appellant a week’s time was granted for compliance but in vain as the same have not been complied with and today yet again it is fixed for non- prosecution. Likewise no one is in attendance and there is no intimation either. Dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge
